siteSettings.tagline: Handcrafted pipe cleaner art for whimsical souls.
siteSettings.metaTitle: Florela — Hand-twisted Pipe Cleaner Flowers & Craft
siteSettings.metaDescription: Florela makes joyful, handmade pipe cleaner flowers, bouquets, keychains, dancing flowers, lamps, bag charms, curtain holders and bento boxes. Order via WhatsApp or Instagram.
siteSettings.whatsappMessage: Hi Florela! I'd love to order one of your pipe cleaner creations 🌸

heroSection.subtitle: Soft, tactile pipe cleaner creations that never wilt. From dancing sunflowers to bento box surprises — every piece is twisted by hand, just for you.

storySection.title: Twisted by hand, loved forever.
paragraphs: Every piece at Florela starts as a simple, fuzzy wire. With careful twists and a sprinkle of imagination, we transform them into vibrant petals, whimsical creatures, and tiny everyday joys.
We believe craft should be tactile. There's something magical about a velvet-soft petal that never wilts — a little reminder that joy can be made by hand.

aboutSection.title: Hi, I am florela.
aboutSection.subtitle: A tiny studio with very twisty fingers and a soft spot for colour.
paragraphs: Florela started with one yellow daisy made for my mom on a quiet Sunday. She kept it on her desk for months, so I made another. And another. Suddenly friends were asking for bouquets, then keychains, then little lamps for their study tables.
Every piece you see here is twisted by hand, one petal at a time, from soft fuzzy pipe cleaners. No factories, no machines — just slow, careful, very colourful work.
The best part? These flowers don't wilt. They sit on shelves, dangle from bags, light up bedrooms and quietly remind you that someone made this just for you.

ctaSection.title: Ready for a blooming gift?
ctaSection.subtitle: Message us to customize your own pipe cleaner bouquet, charm, or surprise.

orderSteps.title: Pick a piece
orderSteps.description: Browse the collection above or share your dream creation with us.

orderSteps.title: DM or WhatsApp
orderSteps.description: Message us on Instagram @florela.ever or ping us on WhatsApp.

orderSteps.title: We twist & ship
orderSteps.description: We handcraft your order, share a sneak peek, and send it to your door.

collectionSection.label: The Wondershop
collectionSection.title: The Craft Collection
collectionSection.description: Eight little worlds twisted from fuzzy wire. Pick a category, message us, and we'll twist one just for you.

orderSectionHeader.title: Ordering is sweet & simple
orderSectionHeader.description: No carts, no checkouts. Just a friendly chat — pick what you love and we'll twist it for you.

products.name: Sunset Rose Bouquet
products.description: A warm-toned bouquet with hand-twisted roses in shades of peach, coral, and soft yellow. Perfect for gifting or home décor.
products.imageAlt: Sunset Rose Bouquet — handmade pipe cleaner flowers by Florela

products.name: Lavender Daisy Stem
products.description: A single fuzzy daisy stem in soft lavender with a cheerful yellow center. Never wilts, always brightens your day.
products.imageAlt: Lavender Daisy Stem — handmade pipe cleaner flower by Florela

products.name: Dancing Sunflower
products.description: A wiggly, cheerful sunflower that sits on your desk and sways with a gentle tap. The ultimate desk companion.
products.imageAlt: Dancing Sunflower — handmade pipe cleaner craft by Florela

products.name: The Rosabella Classic
products.description:
Rosabella- a part of our classic series🌹
A handcrafted floral creation designed to capture the beauty of a blooming lily and the warmth of a heartfelt gift. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, surprises, room décor, or simply reminding someone they are loved
